speaker: charlie
text: G'day Australia, I'm Alex Mercer and it's Tuesday April 28th, welcome to ParkSyde Bright Side. Today we're bringing you stories that'll put a spring in your step and remind you why this big blue marble of ours is worth celebrating. Joining me as always is the incomparable Jamie.

speaker: alice
text: Thanks Alex, absolutely buzzing to be here! We've got some ripper stories today from incredible science breakthroughs to environmental wins that'll make your heart sing. Plus our mate Sam's got the weather that's making everyone want to get outside and enjoy this gorgeous autumn.

speaker: charlie
text: Too right, Jamie. From gene therapy that's literally giving sight to the blind, to green turtles making the comeback of the century, today's bulletin is packed with proof that brilliant minds and dedicated hearts are making real differences. Let's dive in shall we?
